message:
test(robot): freeze stats --json missing-db error envelope (ibuuh.36)

Seventh robot-mode JSON golden, another row of ibuuh.36's verification
matrix. cass stats --json against an isolated empty HOME emits the
ERROR-ENVELOPE variant of the robot-mode JSON contract: a structured
{"error": {"code", "kind", "message", "hint", "retryable"}}
payload documented in robot-docs' exit-codes topic. Agent error-handling
branches key on these exact fields, so drift here silently breaks every
downstream retry/recover path.

Note: this envelope lands on STDERR per cass's robot-mode convention
('stdout=data only; stderr=warnings/errors only' — see --robot-help).
The test reads stderr explicitly since the existing capture_robot_json
helper is stdout-only. Scrubber reused unchanged (paths scrub to
[TEST_HOME]).

Shape frozen: code=3, kind="missing-db", human-readable message with
[TEST_HOME]-scrubbed db_path, hint, retryable=true. If any of those
five keys rename or change type, CI fails on commit.

VERIFICATION:
UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test golden_robot_json → 7/7 pass.
3 consecutive stable re-runs → 7/7 each.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.36; bead stays
open for benchmark / crash-harness / rollout-gate rows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
